nasb.text: A servant who acts wisely will rule over a son who acts shamefully, And will share in the inheritance among brothers.

esv.text: A servant who deals wisely will rule over a son who acts shamefully and will share the inheritance as one of the brothers.

cnv.text: 明慧的僕人，必管轄主人貽羞的兒子； 又可以在眾兒子中同分產業。

ccb.text: 精明的仆人必管辖主人的不肖子， 并与他们一同承受家业。

csbs.text: 明达的奴仆必管辖主人蒙羞的儿子， 并将在兄弟中间分得继业。
